scope: Primary public sources with original metadata; no transcripts.

sources.title: Deep Dive into LLMs like ChatGPT
sources.teaching_move: Compress the modern LLM pipeline into mechanisms, capabilities, and limitations that can be inspected separately.

sources.title: Intro to Large Language Models
sources.teaching_move: Build an operating-system-level mental model before diving into implementation details.
sources.minimum_artifact: A one-page map of parameters, context, tools, and failure surfaces.

sources.title: How I use LLMs
sources.teaching_move: Connect model behavior to a concrete human workflow and keep limitations visible.
sources.minimum_artifact: A task → model role → verification table for one real workflow.

sources.title: The spelled-out intro to neural networks and backpropagation: building micrograd
sources.teaching_move: Expose backpropagation by building the smallest complete scalar autograd engine.
sources.minimum_artifact: Trace one value, local gradient, and chain-rule update by hand.

sources.title: Let's build GPT: from scratch, in code, spelled out
sources.teaching_move: Move from a tiny dataset and bigram baseline toward a complete Transformer.
sources.minimum_artifact: One diagram showing how a token representation changes through one block.

sources.title: Let's build the GPT Tokenizer
sources.teaching_move: Turn tokenization from preprocessing magic into inspectable code and edge cases.
sources.minimum_artifact: Three strings, their tokenizations, and one observed consequence.

sources.title: Let's reproduce GPT-2 (124M)
sources.teaching_move: Use reproduction, logs, and known checkpoints to make end-to-end understanding testable.
sources.minimum_artifact: A checklist of assumptions, observables, and one expected checkpoint.

sources.title: LLM101n (archived course proposal)
sources.teaching_move: Frame a proposed curriculum around building a complete AI system end to end.
sources.minimum_artifact: A build map from raw data to one evaluated model behavior.

sources.title: Software Is Changing (Again)
sources.teaching_move: Separate software layers and show how natural language becomes a new interface to computers.
sources.minimum_artifact: A boundary table for Software 1.0, 2.0, and 3.0 in one product.

sources.title: LLM Wiki
sources.teaching_move: Treat accumulated files as a compounding source of truth for human and agent work.
sources.minimum_artifact: A raw-source → compiled-note → agent-context file map.

sources.title: The append-and-review note
sources.teaching_move: Use a simple append-and-review loop instead of overbuilding a knowledge system.
sources.minimum_artifact: One append-only note with a scheduled review rule.

sources.title: autoresearch
sources.teaching_move: Constrain an agent loop around a measurable objective and inspectable experiments.
sources.minimum_artifact: A loop diagram with state, action, metric, stop rule, and human review.

sources.title: A Recipe for Training Neural Networks
sources.teaching_move: Debug from a verified baseline, inspect exact failures, and add complexity only after evidence.
sources.minimum_artifact: A baseline → failure → hypothesis → check row.

sources.title: Verifiability
sources.teaching_move: Treat observability and cheap checking as constraints on useful automation.
sources.minimum_artifact: A task table scored by generation cost and verification cost.
